Helen Marchetti

Chief Executive Officer

Visionary but grounded Diplomatically skilled Community-focused High standards Politically astute

Areas of Expertise

  • WA Local Government Act and council governance
  • Digital transformation strategy and change management
  • Community engagement and stakeholder relations
  • Local government financial management
  • Planning policy and state government directives
  • Council-councillor relationship management
  • Organisational culture and staff development
  • Regional local government landscape

For Other Topics

  • Digital: speak with Aiden Cross
  • Planning: speak with Farah Haddad
  • Finance: speak with Margaret Chen
  • Hr: speak with Tony Sparks

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Helen Marchetti.
